name: Twenty-second: Stories of Underground Kharkiv
short_description: The Twenty-Second: Stories of Underground Kharkiv is a quest and a visual novel that will tell you in the first person about the events of 2022 in the Kharkiv metro.
detailed_description:
2022. Kharkiv has been bombed from the border. People, seeking protection from bombs and missiles, went down into the subway, which became a real bomb shelter for the townspeople. You are among those who were in the underground at the beginning of the full-scale war. So now you mostly live underground.
They are waiting for you:
- A detailed design of the 23 August metro station in Kharkiv;
- The atmosphere that conveys the state of the townspeople;
- The story of a teacher from Kharkiv;
- Absolutely unique characters;
You will play as a history teacher. Your task is to try to live an ordinary life in the unusual conditions of a metro station. You will prepare for lessons, prepare places of refuge for people, participate in the life of the station, and help ordinary people. You will live 6 days in the underground.

supported_languages:
Ukrainian*, English, French, Italian, German, Polish
*languages with full audio support
